meaning: 美国佬(亦作: Yankee)n. 拽,拔,猛拉
examples: She gave the rope a yank.
Grabbing his ponytail, Shirley gave it a yank.
After a few days with fools, you will want to yank your hair.
XShares floated a hip-replacement-and-knee-replacement ETF that they had to yank off the market in 2008.
Still, I can't go back and knock down the columns and yank out the vines.
